request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a contract's heat tier and its top recent matching records, write a one-sentence (≤220 char) explanation of what is driving heat at this level this week. Also list 1-3 short primary drivers (≤120 chars each). Return JSON matching the schema.
request.user:
Tier: critical
Heat: 261.7
Delta_7d: -122.47
Top records:
- 2024-04-29 FinCEN to Host Webinar on Beneficial Ownership Information Reporting Requirement
- 2024-03-28 Consumer Compliance Supervisory Highlights
- 2024-02-14 Statement of FinCEN Director Andrea Gacki before the House Committee on Financia
- 2024-01-01 U.S. Beneficial Ownership Information Registry Now Accepting Reports
- 2023-11-21 In the Matter of Binance Holdings Limited, et. al. d/b/a Binance and Binance.com

primary_drivers: FinCEN BOI reporting rollout and outreach (webinars, registry, director testimony)
High-profile enforcement action against Binance raising AML/penalty risk perceptions
Consumer compliance supervisory guidance increasing scrutiny on programs
response.explainer: Heat is driven by the FinCEN Beneficial Ownership Information rollout (webinars, registry launch, director testimony), amplified by high-profile enforcement (Binance) and consumer compliance supervisory focus.
